case_title: MARIA DEL CARMEN GONZALEZ VS. TYLER DAVID WILSON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,859.05 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARIA DEL CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, TYLER DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIA DEL CARMEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, TYLER DAVID $2,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,535.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAR IS A TOTAL LOSS, AND AWARDS DAMAGES FOR ITS VALUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,500.97 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, TYLER DAVID
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIA DEL CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, TYLER DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. HAZEL TIJERINO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIA DEL CARMEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, TYLER DAVID $5,080.97 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.97
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
